summary: Verified bug fixes for Mileage Tracking section: 1) Backend API now returns valid JSON with user_name field as Optional, 2) Frontend input fields retain focus during typing. All 11 backend tests passed. Frontend Add/Edit forms working correctly.

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Backend /api/admin/mileage/entries returning 500 due to missing user_name field
bugs_verified_fixed.details: MileageEntryResponse model now has user_name: Optional[str] = 'Unknown'. API returns valid JSON array with 6+ entries.

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Frontend Add Mileage Entry form losing focus on each keystroke
bugs_verified_fixed.details: Tested character-by-character typing 'Home123' - all characters retained. Form submitted successfully with 15.5 miles added.

bugs_verified_fixed.bug: Frontend Edit Mileage Entry form losing focus on each keystroke
bugs_verified_fixed.details: Tested character-by-character typing 'CharByChar' in Edit modal - all characters retained correctly.

critical_code_review_comments: MileageTrackingSection.jsx line 732: handleFormFieldChange helper function correctly uses functional state update to prevent re-render focus loss
Minor: ESLint warning about missing 'resumeTracking' dependency in useCallback at line 146 - not a bug but could be addressed
seed_data_creation: Created test mileage entry during testing, cleaned up afterward
context_for_next_testing_agent: Mileage Tracking section is fully functional. Backend API returns valid data. Add/Edit forms retain focus during typing. Bulk select mode exists but wasn't fully tested (Select All button timing). GPS tracking features not tested (require geolocation permissions).

features_tested.Add Mileage Entry form focus: PASSED - Input fields retain focus while typing
features_tested.Add Mileage Entry submission: PASSED - Entry created successfully, summary updated
features_tested.Edit Mileage Entry form focus: PASSED - Input fields retain focus while typing
features_tested.Recent Trips display: PASSED - Shows trip list with edit/delete buttons
features_tested.Bulk select mode: PARTIAL - Select Trips button works, Select All not fully tested
